name: mjolnir-brain
description: AI Agent Self-Evolving Memory System — persistent memory, self-learning, and auto-correction. Core functions are local-only (pure Markdown + JSON). Optional scripts require: bash 4+, git, grep. Optional backup requires: curl, ssh/scp.
author: king6381
optionalDependencies_note: Core memory system needs NO binaries. Scripts optionally use: bash 4+, git, grep, tar/gzip, curl (WebDAV backup), ssh/scp (SSH backup)
